plan_desc: A pay-as-you-go plan intended for short-term arrangements that are less than 10 hours. Pay bi-weekly or monthly.
Purchase the hours as a package and save 5$/hour. Intended for when your child just needs an extra boost.
Purchase the hours as a package and save 6$/hour. Intended for when your child needs a short-term arrangement.
Purchase the hours as a package and save 7$/hour. Intended for when your child needs a short/mid-term arrangement
Purchase the hours as a package and save 8$/hour. Intended for when your child needs a longer arrangement
Purchase the hours as a package and save 10$/hour. Intended for when your child needs a long-term arrangement
